chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4943 - وَ رَوَى يُونُسُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اَلرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ: "مَنْ آمَنَ رَجُلاً عَلَى دَمِهِ، ثُمَّ قَتَلَهُ جَاءَ يَوْمَ اَلْقِيَامَةِ يَحْمِلُ لِوَاءَ اَلْغَدْرِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4943 - Yunus ibn Abd al-Rahman narrated from Abdullah ibn Sulayman, who said: I heard Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) say:
"Whoever grants a man safety over his life and then kills him will come on the Day of Judgment carrying the banner of treachery."
